title: Block cross-environment login (BASE vs SaaS tenants)
description:
Usernames and passwords now only work on their own environment. SaaS company accounts (for example LEON on REDPIPE) cannot sign in on the base PipeShare server (pipeshare.live). Base server accounts cannot sign in on SaaS tenant subdomains. Each SaaS company workspace remains isolated to its own subdomain.

Who is affected: anyone who was accidentally using the wrong sign-in URL; BASE users and SaaS tenant users must use their correct site.
changeLog: BASE login only matches portal-users and legacy base accounts — not tenant-* users.
Tenant subdomain login rejects base-only portal-users accounts.
Post-password environment check blocks Wasabi fallback cross-login.
SaaS cPanel root (pipeshare.net) rejects tenant-bound and base-only accounts.
